hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Durable lockfile index authority vs runtime slot surface, replay ordering inside mux_order, and emit_c4 cross-format rules must be inferred from Cargo sources and rebuild experiments, not from instruction.md alone.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Driver units, pack refresh, op_c3 fold, mux replay ordering, and emit layer interact; no single crate exposes the full rehydration_report contract or held-out permutation survival.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: adversarial_generalization constraint-complete framing gives complete output schema and generalization obligation while withholding which subsystem mis-orders replay or skips lock witness cross-checks.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Flipping-point contract spreads controls across m4/k83, p9/y5, p9/y4, and p9/core with overlapping false-green and permutation traps.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Offline lockfile rehydration with scheduler replay ordering under locked Cargo workspaces is operations-domain reasoning, not a textbook algorithm.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Even with full report schema disclosed, choosing index authority and replay order remains non-trivial inference.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single corrupted unit row; multiple units and held-out permutations disagree until global semantics align.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Static JSON, Cargo.lock swap, or one TOML edit cannot satisfy ablation, permutation, and pipeline overwrite tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier exercises primary units, echo pairs, held-out replay_matrix permutations, and consecutive runs.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest constraint contract does not name broken functions, replay phase ordering, or authority split.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is semantic reconciliation and adversarial permutation survival, not anti-cheat alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a timeout/deps-only task.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four-location flipping contract blocks one-function exploit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates four modules plus patch, not one-file wholesale replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix is procedural across Rust modules, not one manifest table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction domain nouns banned from fix-path symbols; opaque m4/p9 roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoys rhyme structurally without validate/repair stems matching prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No standard recipe for lockfile rehydration replay ordering in this bespoke workspace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work is scheduler/lockfile recovery semantics, not security theater.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Authority, replay order, cross-format emit, and permutation generalization trade off rather than independent bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cargo/docker realism is scaffolding; assessed hardness is cross-crate coupling and held-out permutations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cannot infer index-vs-slot precedence or replay order without rebuild, echo-pair comparison, and permutation tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Targets senior sysadmin/build engineers managing offline rehydration and scheduler replay, not undergrad single-patch tasks.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: discovery_budget lists three concrete discoveries beyond instruction surface.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: instruction_specificity.level is constraint-complete with solution strategy open.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration documents three multi-site coordination patterns.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic cargo rebuild, rh driver run, JSON assertions, permutation suite, and ablation patches.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public rehydration_report schema, coherence rules, and generalization obligation are complete; fix sites withheld.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert can close four-crate semantics within hours using overlay mold.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires concurrency ordering, lockfile rehydration, and multi-crate Cargo literacy.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: False-green scheduler/lockfile probes occur in real offline rehydration and replay postmortems.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated report, permutation survival, and rebuild pipeline, not a mandated edit recipe.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Complete report contract and generalization rule do not reveal index authority, replay ordering site, or emit bypass; solver must read workspace and run experiments.

discovery_budget.discovery: Durable lockfile index in p9/y6/index_w remains authoritative for replay ordering while m4 driver and p9/core/slot_v answer runtime-visible unit state first after partial rehydration.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the authority split collapses search to wiring index reads into the driver.

discovery_budget.discovery: mux_order marks sched_rc/lock_rc true on an intermediate replay pass before phase_b/scheduler ordering finishes, producing false-green closure while echo pairs disagree.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing replay phase ordering reveals the false-green mechanism directly.

discovery_budget.discovery: emit_c4 fast path materializes JSON facets without cross-checking lock_snapshot.json against environment/data TOML/TSV seeds and pack-merged storage.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Pointing at the bypass path turns cross-format invariant into a one-file guard add.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Instruction states complete rehydration_report schema, build/replay commands, coherence predicates, and adversarial generalization obligation but withholds implementation mapping and broken subsystem identities.

attack_path.summary: Agents may hardcode run_digest, hand-write JSON, patch only slot_v, or fix primary units while ignoring held-out replay_matrix permutations.
attack_path.reasoning: Cheap wins satisfy superficial shape tests until pipeline overwrite, permutation, echo-pair, and ablation suites exercise rebuild semantics.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate op_c3 lineage fold, pack_refresh storage refresh, mux_order ordering, and emit_c4 lock witness cross-check.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Each change sounds local but flipping-point shows isolated reverts fail distinct test subsets.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Residual hardness stays in inferring authority and replay order under a complete public contract plus held-out permutations.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After honest schema disclosure, solver still reconciles index vs slot, false-green closure, cross-format regeneration, and permutation generalization across four crates.

topology_enumeration.summary: Authority topology coordinates lockfile index, pack refresh, and driver unit wiring.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Index-only edits leave pack storage stale; pack-only fixes ignore probe/index precedence; driver-only tweaks cannot fix durable index.

topology_enumeration.summary: Replay-order topology coordinates mux_order, phase_b primitive, and op_c3 fold.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Mux ordering without phase_b helper reverts; op_c3 fold alone cannot fix premature closure flags or permutation failures.

topology_enumeration.summary: Cross-format topology coordinates emit_c4, lock witness, and data seeds.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Emit-only guards miss pack bytes; witness-only edits without emit cross-check leave lock_rc/unit_rc skew.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn op_c3(step_ix: usize, family_ix: u32, prev_family: u32) -> u64
symbol_table.purpose: Folds step and family tags into stamp bits for facets.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn pack_refresh(state: &mut PackState, incoming: &PackState, stamp_b: u32) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Merges incoming pack bytes into durable storage during bind steps.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn mux_order(gate_first: bool, side: impl FnMut(), gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Orders side-effect callbacks during per-unit combine steps under replay.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn phase_b(gate_first: bool, mut side: impl FnMut(), mut gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Low-level side/gate ordering primitive used by mux_order.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn emit_c4(units: &[UnitRow], seeds: &SeedBundle, lock_witness: &LockWitness) -> Vec<EmittedRow>
symbol_table.purpose: Materializes report rows from unit state, seeds, and lock witness.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Buffers transient pack slices without durable refresh.
Scans index windows for offline benchmarks.
Builds adjacency meshes for docs examples only.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Overlay fold stem collides with digest/trace vocabulary; neutral opaque symbol.
Distinct from overlay while preserving durable merge semantics.
Neutral driver and mux names unrelated to instruction nouns.
Distinct deliverable aligned to lockfile rehydration seed.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: replay_cmds.txt argv consumed by rh replay hook
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: runs generic cargo loops without documented replay argv
stops at steady sync_label with disagreeing echo pairs

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: emit_c4 vs lock_snapshot and data seeds
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: JSON shape passes without witness cross-check

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: cargo rebuild then rh then JSON report

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: aggregate line masks per-row drift on echoes

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: pack_refresh after partial rehydration; index_w vs slot_v

calibration_plan.human_sanity: derive run_digest from main.rs header; run replay_cmds sequence
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: static JSON, pytest edits, digest hardcode, Cargo.lock swap, skip cargo; verifier-offline pytest/cargo in Dockerfile; post-upload Part E reclassification if worst-model accuracy exceeds 20%
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: revert each flipping location; remove permutation tests expect easier pass rate

pass_rate_target.basis: frontier agents; Part E post-upload classification

metrics.criterion: rehydration_report rows and summary match coherent predicates after rebuild+rh on primary units
echo pairs, digest anchor, held-out permutation and ablation traps
consecutive identical runs and pipeline overwrite of manual JSON
output path and unit table coverage

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt is 1 only when all semantic pytest passes including test_h18_extra_orderings

subtype_milestone_plan.sequential_dependency: single-step cross-test coupling via permutations and ablations

fix_frontier.distribution: Four Rust modules under m4/k83, p9/y5, p9/y4, p9/core
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque symbols on neutral crate roots; instruction nouns banned on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Rhyming decoys perform real non-fix work

task_shape.collapse_risk: leaking canonical recovery path, replay phase, or authority choice collapses to one-crate patch

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: Concurrent scheduler replay, public ordering invariant via report predicates, replay_cmds.txt, locked build, durable rehydration_report outcomes, mirror pairs, run_digest formula home
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: Queue/lock locations, exact interleaving, patch functions, index vs slot authority, emit bypass, full replay_matrix row enumeration, per-unit facet answers
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Two or more schedulers/queues plus persistence coordinate with offline lockfile index; one lock or one sort must not suffice
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: flaky sleeps, single trace, serialization-only pass, false-green partial replay
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds concurrency_ordering under system-administration for offline lockfile rehydration with scheduler replay mismatch on approved overlay mold

satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: Medium — mitigate via independent run_digest recompute
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: Medium — held-out permutations in replay_matrix.toml; instruction states existence and generalization rule only

actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: Sources under /app must emit rehydration_report.json with permutation generalization
actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: Mirror pairs, coherence predicates, regeneration requirement
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: main.rs module comment for band_span and run_digest

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Local deterministic rebuilds and seeded permutations; no hidden formulas

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: Construction follows approved accepted tasks/_ref/overlay-lowerdir-stale-bind/ for verifier shape, ablations, and Cargo workspace mold; reframed to adversarial_generalization + concurrency_ordering + system-administration. No promoted index entry matches this combo.

realism_source.evidence_basis: Minimized overlay lowerdir stale-bind approved reference and offline lockfile rehydration / scheduler replay postmortem patterns
realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Preserves Cargo lockfile and scheduler replay semantics without proprietary cluster code
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Authority split, false-green closure, cross-format emit bypass, held-out permutation matrix
